## What

A short summary of what this PR changes.

## Why

The motivation: the bug being fixed, the issue being closed, or the
capability being added. Link the GitHub issue if there is one (`Closes #N`).

## Test plan

How you verified this. At minimum:

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally.
- [ ] Manual smoke check, if behavior is user-visible (describe what you ran).
- [ ] Live tests (`PLAUD_LIVE_READS=1`), if the change touches the Plaud
  client layer — and only against a sacrificial account.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything you intentionally left out of scope, follow-up issues you opened,
or surprises you ran into while implementing.
